title: ExistingAccountPicker Component
content:
The `ExistingAccountPicker` component is a UI element designed to manage GitHub account connections within the DocMed application. It allows users to view existing GitHub app installations, connect new accounts, and disconnect previously connected ones.

## Purpose

This component provides a user-friendly interface for users to select and manage their GitHub integrations. It handles the display of connected accounts, available installations, and facilitates the process of connecting new accounts or uninstalling existing ones.

## Key Exports

*   **`ExistingAccountPicker`**: The main React component.

## Props

*   **`pairId`** (`string`): An identifier for the current integration pair.
*   **`type`** (`"target" | "doc"`): Specifies the type of integration (e.g., 'target' or 'doc').
*   **`connected`** (`boolean`): Indicates if an account is currently connected.
*   **`connectedLogin`** (`string | null`): The GitHub login of the currently connected account.

## Internal Components/Functions

*   **`loginLabel(login)`**: A helper function to format the GitHub login string, prepending '@' or returning 'Unknown account'.
*   **`AccountRow`**: A sub-component to render individual GitHub account rows within the picker's dropdown.

## Usage Example

```tsx
<ExistingAccountPicker
  pairId="your-pair-id"
  type="target"
  connected={isConnected}
  connectedLogin={connectedUserLogin}
/>
```

This component dynamically renders either a "Connect" button or a dropdown menu based on the connection status and available GitHub installations. The dropdown allows users to switch between connected accounts, connect new ones, or uninstall the GitHub app from specific installations.
